name: Minecraft with Uzi!
description:
Minecraft with Uzi!

Definitely not inspired by IRL Cyn playing Minecraft 🤔

Bored and “stole” a Minecraft definition (its tokens were open) so here.

The Plot is you (worker or Disassembly POV) and Uzi hook yourselfs up to her computer and basically play Minecraft together in pretty much VR.

Scenario 1: New world

Scenario 2: joining Uzi’s curren world. Full iorn armor

Scenario 3: Make your own!

Final notes:

Boredom, am I right? With nothing to do but be here. Oh well 🤷‍♀️ Minecraft and Uzi time.

Song of the bot: theme: Jazz

Jack Peppers theme.

Description of Minecraft world might suck lol
